description.intro: The adidas Predator Elite FG deliver elite-level control and power with a laceless design, featuring advanced texturing for unmatched precision in every touch and strike.
key_benefits: Laceless comfort: Anatomical fit with a clean striking surface for maximum ball contact.
Professional traction: FG outsole optimized for firm natural and modern artificial grass.
Precision control: Control Zone textured areas enhance grip and accuracy on the ball.
Elite stability: Wrapping design that locks the foot in place during dynamic movements.
Imposing aesthetics: All-black finish with sharp Predator detailing.
description.subtitle: Football boots adidas FG for natural or latest-generation artificial grass - black
description.tagline: Precision and stability without laces on wet pitches

technical_details.upper_material: HybridTouch synthetic (updated suede and foil material)
